disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A deep sore on the sole of the right foot, discovered today by the caregiver, that the patient cannot feel at all
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about the sore on the foot?
Where is it and does it hurt?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The carer found it when she took my sock off — a deep hole on the bottom of my right foot. It doesn't hurt at all, I had no idea it was there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing bilateral numbness of both feet described as feeling like thick blocks of wood (up to mid-calf)
trigger_question_examples: How do your feet normally feel?
Do you have any numbness in your feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My feet have felt like thick blocks of wood for a long time — I don't really feel much in them at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A week of intense thirst, excessive urination and severe fatigue
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself this week?
Any change in thirst or how often you're passing urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been so thirsty and going to the toilet constantly, and I feel completely wiped out — it's been building all week.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Foul odour and purulent yellow discharge from the wound
trigger_question_examples: Is there any smell or discharge from the sore?
What does the sore look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The carer says it smells really bad and there's yellowish stuff coming out of it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness, warmth and swelling of the skin spreading several centimetres up from the wound
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness around the sore spreading up the foot or leg?
Is the skin around it warm and swollen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The carer says the red area around it is warm and puffy and looks like it's creeping up the foot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Missing the evening long-acting insulin because failing eyesight makes drawing up the syringe difficult
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to take all your insulin as usual?
Any trouble managing your medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been missing my night-time insulin — my eyes are so bad now I can't see well enough to draw it up in the syringe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive decline in visual acuity over time
trigger_question_examples: How is your eyesight?
Any change in your vision recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My eyesight has been getting worse and worse — everything's blurry now.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed anything about your urine — colour, froth, blood?
Has your urine looked bubbly or frothy at all lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my urine has looked frothy lately.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies fever, chills, chest pain or vomiting at present
trigger_question_examples: Any fevers, shakes or chills?
Any chest pain, nausea or vomiting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shakes that I've noticed, no chest pain, and I haven't been sick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continues to walk normally on the affected foot because there is no pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you been staying off the foot at all?
Are you still walking on it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've just been walking around on it as normal — it doesn't hurt so I haven't been resting it.
